title: Erigeron lalehzaricus
intro: Erigeron lalehzaricus, also known as Lalehzar daisy or mountain fleabane, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the family Asteraceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help alleviate symptoms of digestive disorders, respiratory issues, and skin conditions. The bioactive constituents of Erigeron lalezaricus include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are traditionally used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
